## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview with Faith Faseyiku for Managing Editor position at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Faith demonstrates strong passion for AI/automation in content processes, aligning with fwd.digital's innovative approach](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Seeking more hands-on work and learning opportunities, particularly in AI-driven content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Showcases adaptability, innovation, and quick learning as key strengths](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Marcel emphasizes the importance of intellectual curiosity and extreme ownership for success in the role](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)

## Topics

### Faith's Background and Motivations

  - [Currently works at Anmols in a leadership role, but seeks more hands-on involvement](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Attracted to fwd.digital's advanced AI workflows and automation processes](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Eager to learn and contribute to AI-driven content strategies and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Values the opportunity to work with experts and implement innovative ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Current Role and Strengths

  - [Reports to Daniel, who oversees customer experience](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Described as adaptable, innovative, and thinking outside the box](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Example: Revamped content strategy for financial services company, focusing on user intent and benefits rather than technical details](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Improved conversion rates from 18-20% to 45%, significantly boosting website engagement](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)

### Notable Accomplishments

  - [Redesigned a startup's website, improving engagement from 20 weekly views to 1,000+ weekly sessions](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [Implemented natural language flow, clear CTAs, and targeted content addressing pain points](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Collaborated with team on weekly blogs to boost brand awareness and stay competitive](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

### Faith's Superpower

  - [Ability to learn and adapt quickly to new concepts and technologies](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Example: Learned prompt engineering and API integration within a week, creating an efficient content operations workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)

### Success Factors for the Role

[Marcel emphasized two key elements:](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

1.  Insane intellectual curiosity
2.  Extreme ownership
      - [Raising the bar internally](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
      - [Caring about client results more than the clients themselves](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
      - [Delivering exceptional value to make clients wish they could hire Faith directly](https://fathom.video/share/Y65-XFixPzkUwygm-TSxRi2y77hmDiZa?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
